name: Team Kaine
subject: "an extension of the president"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Kaine for Virginia

Derek -- a few days ago, Corey Stewart, Tim's only Republican opponent so far, sent an email to his supporters with the subject line, "Which Wall?" And you've gotta see what was in it:

Choose Your Border Wall [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaineforvirginia?refcode=20171028nd&amount=25 ]

That's right. He was actually asking people to vote on which *border wall* they preferred. Instead of talking to his supporters about the many issues that would directly impact the lives of Virginians, Corey's ginning up his right wing base about Donald Trump's border wall -- an unnecessary, expensive boondoggle more than a thousand miles away, that he would have Virginia taxpayers (not Mexico, as Trump had promised!) pay as much as $70 billion for, even though it wouldn't do anything to make our communities safer.

But I guess we shouldn't be surprised. In a recent interview, Corey actually called himself "an extension of the president."

You know what? I don't think Virginians want a Donald Trump clone in the U.S. Senate.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Express donate $20.18 >> [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaineforvirginia?express_lane=true&refcode=20171028nd&amount=20.18 ] Express donate $20.18 >> [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaineforvirginia?express_lane=true&refcode=20171028nd&amount=25 ] Express donate $50 >> [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaineforvirginia?express_lane=true&refcode=20171028nd&amount=50 ] Express donate $100 >> [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaineforvirginia?express_lane=true&refcode=20171028nd&amount=100 ] Or, donate a different amount >> [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaineforvirginia?refcode=20171028nd ]

I know it, you know it, and I believe plenty of folks in the Republican Party agree with us, too. But that won't stop right-wing groups and special interests from putting party over country and supporting him anyway if he's the GOP nominee. So it's on us to build up the resources to fight back against the millions of dollars that will be spent attacking Tim in this campaign.

Will you do your part to stop Corey from representing Virginia in the Senate and pitch in $20.18 or whatever you can afford to Tim's re-election today?

PITCH IN >> [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaineforvirginia?refcode=20171028nd&amount=10 ]

The sad truth is that if Donald Trump can be elected President of the United States, a guy like Corey Stewart can be elected U.S. Senator. We've learned that we can't take anything for granted. So thank you for stepping up -- I appreciate it (and so does Tim).

Thank you.

-Team Kaine

DONATE [ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kaineforvirginia?refcode=20171028nd&amount=10 ]

Paid for by Kaine for Virginia

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please unsubscribe [ http://action.timkaine.com/p/salsa/supporter/unsubscribe/public/?Email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&email_blast_KEY=1379938 ].

name: Tom Perez
subject: re: Trump 2020
body:
Step up before our October deadline.
---
**Pitch in $3 or whatever you can before our end-of-month deadline to help Democrats compete and win all over the country.
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/40523ad6/4067b0a/462a1eec1/7e67d153/923512637/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/October-Deadline-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20171028_tp_nd&source=em_20171028_tp_nd&refcode=em_20171028_tp_nd")**
**
Every day, Donald Trump shows the world why he shouldn't be in the White House. Our mission is to make sure he doesn't get a second term.

Yet Republicans are already hard at work on their re-election plan. His campaign has officially launched -- they're raising and spending money for Trump 2020.

If just the thought of that makes you wince, let's get to work. We're going to make more calls, knock on more doors, register more voters, and win elections in every corner of the country. And at fundraising deadlines like this one, we need supporters like you to step up.

Can we count on you, Derek? Chip in $3 before our deadline.

name: Stephanie Schriock, EMILY's List
subject: Our best hope for real answers on Trump + Russia
body:
| [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c63e1/24c69fd9/17b1bedb8/189c2003/48743753/VEsH/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFCJ33N_digital_email_20171028_Feinstein_inact&source=WQEFCJ33N_digital_email_20171028_Feinstein_inact")
---

Peter,

Senator Dianne Feinstein is a champion, pure and simple.

From serving as the highest ranking Democrat on the powerful Senate Judiciary Committee to always -- ALWAYS -- defending women, Dianne has been the advocate we've needed.

And with President Trump trampling on every norm and respectable boundary ever set, we can't afford to lose Dianne's powerful voice and experience in the Senate.

A new challenger has entered Dianne's race, and she needs us to fight for her as she's fought for us over the years.

**[Donate $3 now to help send Dianne back to the Senate next year-- 100% of your donation will go to her campaign.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c63e1/24c69fd9/17b1bedb8/189c203c/48743753/VEsE/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate/candidate/dianne-feinstein?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+now+to+help+send+Dianne+back+to&utm_campaign=WQEFCJ33N_digital_email_20171028_Feinstein_inact&source=WQEFCJ33N_digital_email_20171028_Feinstein_inact")**

For her entire Senate career, Dianne has consistently defended Planned Parenthood and a woman's right to choose.

She's also been a vocal advocate for gun violence prevention. She introduced the 1994 assault weapons ban, fought to renew it in the wake of Sandy Hook, and proposed a ban on bump stocks in the wake of the Las Vegas shooting.

Dianne's done a lot to protect our public lands, too. She passed a bill to protect more than seven million acres of desert, helped begin a multi-year clean up of Lake Tahoe, and enacted protections for the redwoods of Headwaters Forest.

And with her critical position on the judiciary committee, Dianne is our best hope to get real answers on the Trump campaign's connections to Russia.

EMILY's List was proud to endorse Dianne as she broke barriers to be one of the first two women California elected to the Senate. And we are proud to stand with her again as she runs for re-election.

**Donate $3 to fight for Dianne Feinstein as she's fought for us, and 100% of what you give will go directly to her:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Support-Dianne](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c63e1/24c69fd9/17b1bedb8/189c203d/48743753/VEsF/ "https://www.emilyslist.org/donate/candidate/dianne-feinstein?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgSupportDianne&utm_campaign=WQEFCJ33N_digital_email_20171028_Feinstein_inact&source=WQEFCJ33N_digital_email_20171028_Feinstein_inact")**

Thanks,

Stephanie Schriock
President, EMILY's List

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: If you have a checking account, this affects you:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC, dscc
body:
This week, Senate Republicans voted to overturn a new rule that protects your right to take big banks to court. Fight back >>
---
**[](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20171028-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")**
Team,

This week, Senate Republicans voted to overturn the Consumer Financial Protection Bureau's new rule that protects your right to take big banks and financial institutions like Wells Fargo and Equifax to court when they cheat you.

We worked our hearts out seven years ago to create an agency that would get the tricks and traps out of financial products and level the playing field for working families. But now, Senate Republicans are gutting the CFPB and weakening essential consumer protections.

[**Contribute $1 now to hold Republicans accountable for their late night vote to put big banks ahead of working families.**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20171028-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

If you have a checking account, a credit card, or a student loan, you've probably signed a very long contract with a bunch of gibberish that you didn't bother to read.

(It's ok, I was a contract law professor for many years, and I've done it, too.)

Hidden in the fine print of many of those contracts is a forced arbitration clause. That's a fancy way of saying that you signed away your right to join together in court in a class action lawsuit to challenge big companies when they break the law.

I call these forced arbitration clauses "ripoff clauses," and for good reason. If a bank unfairly charges you $10, you're most likely not going to spend the time and money challenging them all on your own through an industry-friendly arbitration process. So if a bank sneaks that small fee in millions of people's bills, they can create ginormous profits for themselves -- with little accountability from their customers.

By prohibiting forced arbitration clauses, the CFPB made huge progress in stopping companies from tricking, misleading, and flat out cheating their customers. But then the big financial institutions spent millions of dollars on lawyers, lobbyists, and slick PR campaigns to get their Republican pals in Congress to reverse this policy.

That's millions of dollars on top of the big bucks that they're already spending to repeal the rules we put in place after the 2008 crisis -- including the new Consumer Financial Protection Bureau.

The CFPB is doing its job -- and our job is to defend the agency and to defend its work.

**The DSCC needs your support to counter the big banks and hold Senate Republicans accountable for gutting consumer protections. Contribute $1 now:**

[**http://www.dscc.org/working-families-before-wall-street**](http://action.dscc. "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dscc-ewarren?refcode=DPE-20171028-Warren-ProsHV&recurring=auto&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1= &city=&state=&zip=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5,10,25,50,100,150,250&amount=5")

Thanks for being a part of this,

Elizabeth

**Democratic Senatorial Campaign Committee
120 Maryland Ave. NE
Washington, DC 20002** Paid for by the DSCC, dscc.org,
and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate. This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com because you are a part of the DSCC's grassroots network. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please [click here](http://action.dscc.org/page/m/3954ddb1/2b07114c/f86ea0b4/7316c032/859813783/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/supportdscc?refcode=DPE-disclaimer"). Together, we're going to take back the Senate, but we'll need the help of every single grassroots supporter to do it. name: Team Donnelly
subject: Hands off Medicare!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
Tell the GOP: Hands off Medicare! |
---

| | Peter,

Since taking office, Joe has fought to protect Medicare. He understands the important role it plays for millions of Hoosiers who have spent their lives paying into the system with the expectation of receiving quality, affordable care. But while older Americans rely on Medicare, special interest groups and certain Republicans just seem to think it's expendable. **That 's right -- House and Senate Republicans have both in the past week forced through a budget resolution that would cut Medicare by nearly $475 BILLION. **There's no back-up plan for those seniors whose benefits would get cut -- _they 'd simply leave them out in the cold. _ **[Join us and tell the GOP: Hands off Medicare.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c24a1/7377f838/34e20381/51fbbf7f/1007274165/VEsH/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/nocutstomedicare/?code=donnelly&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjd-hcrr%3Frefcode%3D20171028%26amount%3D10")** _Peter, we can 't believe we have to even write this email._ There's a reason why Medicare is one of the most popular government programs in the country. There's nothing as responsible for making healthcare affordable for millions of seniors. That's why some members of the GOP are already cracking and saying they won't support cuts to programs like Medicare. **But there somehow still isn 't a majority in Congress to protect this crucial program, and without your support, there won't be**. **[We must keep the pressure on. Add your voice today: Tell the GOP NO cuts to Medicare.](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c24a1/7377f838/34e20381/51fbbf7f/1007274165/VEsE/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/nocutstomedicare/?code=donnelly&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fjd-hcrr%3Frefcode%3D20171028%26amount%3D10")** \--Team Donnelly

body:
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde47/2a380d31/23710f9/fe1522/3887028552/VEsH/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
[](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde47/2a380d31/23710f9/fe1522/3887028552/VEsE/ "http://www.maggiehassan.com/")
Hello,
As a tax reform plan begins to take shape in Congress, we need to focus on one thing: helping hard-working families.
If we work together, we can find sensible solutions to grow our economy without adding to the deficit and putting a burden on our children and grandchildren.
Sound like a plan? Great. **[Put your name down to join our grassroots team urging Congress to pass a tax reform plan that would benefit hard-working families, not just corporate special interests and millionaires.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde47/2a380d31/23710f9/fe1523/3887028552/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/protectworkingfamilies/?code=Hassan&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2017_taxreform-ja&20171024_taxreformja_up&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")**
Unfortunately, Donald Trump and many Washington Republicans have different priorities.
Instead of making sure the single mother who works three jobs and the young person trying to get a start-up off the ground are taken care of, they want to offer tax breaks to the wealthiest among us -\- especially the Wall Street millionaires and hedge fund billionaires who backed their campaigns.
**Let 's make sure that Washington Republicans know that we expect them to work for the American people, not the wealthy few who buy their seats in Congress. [Please sign our petition to tell Congress that tax reform should help hard-working Americans.](http://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fde47/2a380d31/23710f9/fe1523/3887028552/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjAzMjY0In0=/ "https://petitions.signforgood.com/protectworkingfamilies/?code=Hassan&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2F2017_taxreform-ja&20171024_taxreformja_up&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=03264")**

clean_body: "" "" Hello, As a tax reform plan begins to take shape in Congress, we need to focus on one thing: helping hard-working families. If we work together, we can find sensible solutions to grow our economy without adding to the deficit and putting a burden on our children and grandchildren. Sound like a plan? Great. "" Unfortunately, Donald Trump and many Washington Republicans have different priorities. Instead of making sure the single mother who works three jobs and the young person trying to get a start-up off the ground are taken care of, they want to offer tax breaks to the wealthiest among us -\- especially the Wall Street millionaires and hedge fund billionaires who backed their campaigns. Let 's make sure that Washington Republicans know that we expect them to work for the American people, not the wealthy few who buy their seats in Congress. "" Middle class families have enough to worry about without an increase to their tax burden, so thank you for taking action. -- Team Maggie ""

body:
We elect pro-choice Democratic women who will fight for women and families. | [ ](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c63d7/24c69fd9/17a1ab045/189fcd47/4086537316/VEsH/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/donate-to-emily?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ59N_digital_email_20171028_EOMOctSupporterRecord_inact&source=WQEFEJ59N_digital_email_20171028_EOMOctSupporterRecord_inact")
---

Peter,

In just 10 days, _**over 50**_ EMILY's List candidates are on the ballot in state and local races across the country.

We have an October End-of-Month goal of $125,000, which we need to meet in order to help these women win. We've had an incredible month so far, and I know we can blast through this goal too if we all work together.

According to our records associated with this email address, here's how you've helped our women so far this month:
**October Donor Status:** Inactive
**[Suggested Action: Donate $3 to help pro-choice Democratic women WIN on Election Day.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c63d7/24c69fd9/17a1ab045/189fcd40/4086537316/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171028_email_OctoberEOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Suggested+Action+Donateif+consinConsGrou&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ59N_digital_email_20171028_EOMOctSupporterRecord_inact&source=WQEFEJ59N_digital_email_20171028_EOMOctSupporterRecord_inact")**
This is the first major Election Day since Donald Trump became president, and we're excited to show that the resistance is strong everywhere -- including at the ballot box.

Let's elect a wave of women who will resist and persist right alongside us, who will fight with everything they have to protect those Trump and his fellow Republicans would hurt.

There are only a few days left to help our 2017 candidates finish strong.

**Donate $3 before October is over to help our women win on November 7th:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/October-Supporter-Record](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c63d7/24c69fd9/17a1ab045/189fcd41/4086537316/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20171028_email_OctoberEOM?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgOctoberSupporter&utm_campaign=WQEFEJ59N_digital_email_20171028_EOMOctSupporterRecord_inact&source=WQEFEJ59N_digital_email_20171028_EOMOctSupporterRecord_inact")**

Thank you -- and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List
